title: DecisionRequest
description: Envelope-composed artifact for a typed escalation from executing work. The payload is a discriminated union that preserves daimyo's mechanically distinct permission and routing surfaces.
$comment: Protocol wire fields use snake_case. DGOS-T-0019 should reconcile daimyo's camelCase names to these schema-authoritative names without collapsing the two surfaces.

decisionRequestPayload.title: DecisionRequestPayload
decisionRequestPayload.description: Daimyo-compatible DecisionRequest payload. Permission requests carry tool invocation data; routing requests carry a needs-decision content bubble.

decision_id.description: Protocol snake_case representation of daimyo's DecisionId-bearing id field.

node_id.description: Protocol snake_case representation of daimyo's NodeId.

task_id.description: Protocol snake_case representation of daimyo's TaskId.

prompt.description: REQUIRED string. Decision prompt or permission question.

tool_name.description: REQUIRED string. Tool name for the permission-gating surface.

decision_id.description: Protocol snake_case representation of daimyo's DecisionId-bearing id field.

node_id.description: Protocol snake_case representation of daimyo's NodeId.

task_id.description: Protocol snake_case representation of daimyo's TaskId.

prompt.description: REQUIRED string. Needs-decision content bubble routed sideways by a parent loop.

options.description: OPTIONAL array. Candidate choices available to the decision-routing surface.
